footnotes.text: On the word, etc.: he means to say that he will take action in a strictly legal way, as required by Deut. 19, 15.
We also are weak: i.e., we share in the sufferings of Christ.
Christ dwells in the intellect by faith, in the heart and affections by charity, in the soul by grace.
St. Paul hopes there will be no reason at Corinth that will deserve the exercise of his divine authority. He is not eager to draw attention to his God-given powers.
Your perfecting: perhaps in the sense of "your correction."
